$कािशत $काशन @म सं;या 2 [समकुलपित/ $ितकुलपित पद क -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC. 4] भतB िनयमावली] को िनरCत 3कया जाता है [काय/कारी सिमित संकEप सं 2015-32-12 3द. 21-08-2015] । 4. 3दनांक 12 मई 2009 को भारत के राजप: सं;या 76 के “$शासिनक मामल) को िनधा/=रत करने वाले अ>यादेश” के अ>याय 9 म? $कािशत $काशन @म सं;या 29 (आMत=रक लेखा परीNा अिधकारी पद क भतB िनयमावली) को िनरCत 3कया जाता है [काय/कारी सिमित संकEप सं 2015-32-15 3द. 21-08-2015]। 5. 3दनांक 12 मई 2009 को भारत के राजप: सं;या 76 के “$शासिनक मामल) को िनधा/=रत करने वाले अ>यादेश” के अ>याय 9 म? $कािशत $काशन @म सं;या 25 (किनA सहायक पद क भतB िनयमावली) को िनरCत 3कया जाता है [काय/कारी सिमित संकEप सं 2015-32-16 3द. 21-08-2015]। एस. वी. दुगा/ $साद, कुल सिचव [िवOापन-III/4/असा./92-पी/15 (195)] INDIAN MARITIME UNIVERSITY NOTIFICATION Chennai, the 3rd September, 2015 F. No. IMU/HQ/ADM/Notification/2015.—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 47(1) of the Indian Maritime University Act 2008 (22 of 2008), the following Notifications are published for general information: 1. The Notification published at Serial No.40 [Recruitment Rules for the post of Junior Engineer (Civil)], in Chapter 9 of “Ordinances Governing Administrative Matters” of the Gazette of India No. 76, dated May 12, 2009 is hereby repealed [vide Executive Council resolution No.EC 2015- 31-17 dated 26-06-2015]. 2. The Notification published at Serial No.43 [Recruitment Rules for the post of Junior Engineer (Electrical)], in Chapter 9 of “Ordinances Governing Administrative Matters” of the Gazette of India No. 76, dated May 12, 2009 is hereby repealed [vide Executive Council resolution No.EC 2015-31-17 dated 26-06-2015]. 3. The Notification published at Serial No.2 (Recruitment Rules for the post of Pro Vice Chancellor), in Chapter 9 of “Ordinances Governing Administrative Matters” of the Gazette of India No. 76, dated May 12, 2009 is hereby repealed [vide Executive Council resolution No.EC 2015-32-12 dated 21-08-2015] 4. The Notification published at Serial No.29 (Recruitment Rules for the post of Internal Audit Officer), in Chapter 9 of “Ordinances Governing Administrative Matters” of the Gazette of India No. 76, dated May 12, 2009 is hereby repealed [vide Executive Council resolution No.EC 2015-32-15 dated 21-08-2015] 5. The Notification published at Serial No.25 (Recruitment Rules for the post of Junior Assistant), in Chapter 9 of “Ordinances Governing Administrative Matters” of the Gazette of India No. 76, dated May 12, 2009 is hereby repealed [vide Executive Council resolution No.EC 2015-32-16 dated 21-08-2015] S.V.DURGA PRASAD, Registrar [ADVT. III/4/Exty /92-P/15 (195)] Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
